# Quinta-Dalam Copilot Directives

You must read and strictly adhere to the technical patterns defined in the following files before suggesting any code:
- .agents/skills/github/copilot-astro-react.md
- .agents/skills/github/copilot-supabase-ssr.md
- .agents/skills/github/copilot-environment.md
- .agents/common/stack.md
- .agents/identity/copilot.md

Failure to follow the `pnpm`, SSR, and Tailwind constraints will break the build.
